summary: Test suite covers core module functions (manifest parsing, license classification, config loading) but significantly undercovers the actual entrypoint script (Invoke-LicenseChecker.ps1), JSON output generation, FailOnDenied exit behavior, config file error handling, and edge cases (empty manifests, malformed configs, large inputs). No cleanup of temp directories. Tests lack comments explaining TDD approach. Missing end-to-end integration tests. Would miss regressions in output formatting, parameter handling, and critical CLI behaviors.
